description: DeBERTa-v3-base minimal stable configuration. Three problems diagnosed in setup13: (1) freeze_embeddings_epochs=1 blocks gradient flow in DeBERTa's disentangled attention during epoch 1, so the model starts near random and the cosine LR has already peaked before full-model learning begins; (2) lr=1e-5 too conservative once freeze is removed; (3) positive_class_weight_scale=0.5 over-corrected — effective weight 1.13x gives too weak a positive signal. Fixes: no freeze, no layerwise decay, lr=2e-5 (standard DeBERTa-v3 fine-tuning LR), positive_class_weight_scale=1.0 (raw class ratio ~2.27x, no amplification). Scheduler changed to linear for more predictable decay. Keep optimizer_eps=1e-6, max_grad_norm=1.0, warmup_ratio=0.1, weight_decay=0.01. Input: query + response, matching setup6/setup12 for direct backbone comparison.
